result.stdout:
Description:
  CLI tool to use OpenApiGenerator

Usage:
  OpenApiGenerator.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <input>                                           Generates client sdk using a OpenAPI spec. []
  simplify <input>                                           Simplifies OpenAPI spec. []
  init <solution-name> <api-name> <open-api-spec> <company>  Creates a new solution with GitHub Actions. [, , , ]

commands.payload:
Description:
  CLI tool to use OpenApiGenerator

Usage:
  OpenApiGenerator.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <input>                                           Generates client sdk using a OpenAPI spec. []
  simplify <input>                                           Simplifies OpenAPI spec. []
  init <solution-name> <api-name> <open-api-spec> <company>  Creates a new solution with GitHub Actions. [, , , ]

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates client sdk using a OpenAPI spec.

Usage:
  OpenApiGenerator.Cli generate [<input>] [options]

Arguments:
  <input>  Input file path []

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                                                                                Output file path [default: Generated]
  -t, --targetFramework <targetFramework>                                                              TargetFramework for the generated code [default: net8.0]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                                                                          Namespace for the generated code []
  -c, --clientClassName <clientClassName>                                                              Client class name []
  -m, --methodNamingConvention <MethodAndPath|OperationIdSplit|OperationIdWithDots|SimpleOperationId>  Method Naming Convention [default: SimpleOperationId]
  -s, --single-file                                                                                    Generate all models in a single file [default: False]
  -e, --exclude-deprecated-operations                                                                  Exclude deprecated operations [default: False]
  --clsCompliantEnumPrefix <clsCompliantEnumPrefix>                                                    Prefix for enums which start with a number to make them CLS compliant. Pass empty string to disable prefixing(it will be non-CLS compliant '_') [default: x]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generates client sdk using a OpenAPI spec.

Usage:
  OpenApiGenerator.Cli generate [<input>] [options]

Arguments:
  <input>  Input file path []

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                                                                                Output file path [default: Generated]
  -t, --targetFramework <targetFramework>                                                              TargetFramework for the generated code [default: net8.0]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                                                                          Namespace for the generated code []
  -c, --clientClassName <clientClassName>                                                              Client class name []
  -m, --methodNamingConvention <MethodAndPath|OperationIdSplit|OperationIdWithDots|SimpleOperationId>  Method Naming Convention [default: SimpleOperationId]
  -s, --single-file                                                                                    Generate all models in a single file [default: False]
  -e, --exclude-deprecated-operations                                                                  Exclude deprecated operations [default: False]
  --clsCompliantEnumPrefix <clsCompliantEnumPrefix>                                                    Prefix for enums which start with a number to make them CLS compliant. Pass empty string to disable prefixing(it will be non-CLS compliant '_') [default: x]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates a new solution with GitHub Actions.

Usage:
  OpenApiGenerator.Cli init [<solution-name> [<api-name> [<open-api-spec> [<company>]]]] [options]

Arguments:
  <solution-name>  Solution name []
  <api-name>       API client name []
  <open-api-spec>  OpenAPI spec url []
  <company>        Company name []

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  Output directory []
  -m, --add-mkdocs       Adds MkDocs to the solution [default: True]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Creates a new solution with GitHub Actions.

Usage:
  OpenApiGenerator.Cli init [<solution-name> [<api-name> [<open-api-spec> [<company>]]]] [options]

Arguments:
  <solution-name>  Solution name []
  <api-name>       API client name []
  <open-api-spec>  OpenAPI spec url []
  <company>        Company name []

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  Output directory []
  -m, --add-mkdocs       Adds MkDocs to the solution [default: True]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
